name: hb_2_16
requirements: As part of your analysis, define spatial heterogeneity as the population std of per-station mean AQI across all stations in Yuhua District. Over 2025-06-25 12:00 to 2025-06-26 12:00 compute and store: n_stations (int), spatial_std_aqi, district_mean_aqi, max_station_mean_aqi (float).

turns.query: Analyze air quality spatial heterogeneity within Yuhua District on 2025-06-25 12:00:00 to 2025-06-26 12:00:00, considering topographical features.
